title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.140 - Penalty
text:
417.140.  Penalty. — Any person doing any of the acts in sections 417.100 and 417.130 prohibited, or omitting to do any of the acts thereby commanded, shall be guilty of a misdemeanor, and for each and every offense shall be punished by a fine of not less than twenty nor more than two hundred dollars, one-half of which shall be paid to the person who shall be named as prosecuting witness.
(RSMo 1939 § 9922, A. 1949 H.B. 2111) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13082; 1919 § 5728; 1909 § 6622
